events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`: box fill exceeds NEC 314.16 allowable volume — a calculable, direct code violation. Marked `fail`/`high risk` since it's correctable now at rough-in but would become a concealed hazard if closed in, with corrective actions (recalculate fill, upsize box/add extension ring, re-terminate) and reinspection before cover-up.
